title: Is Happiness More Important Than Success? - PositivePsychology.com
content: What is more important to you,happinessorsuccess? According to psychologist Daniel Gilbert, who is a psychology professor at Harvard,happinessis the ultimate goal of virtually all the decisions we make in life (Gilbert, 2010). Gilbert suggests that the measure of a good decision depends on whether that decision brings us pleasure, a sense of wellbeing,happinessor contentment ...
